channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FIRSTCRY] Brainbees Solutions Ltd Receives Rectification Order from Income Tax Department, Reducing Demand by Rs. 30,97,93,120/- for AY 2022-23
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Brainbees Solutions Ltd has received a rectification order and demand notice from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner of Income Tax, Central Circle 1(1), Pune, reducing the demand for AY 2022-23 from Rs. 31,36,30,330/- to Rs. 38,37,210/-. The Company had previously informed about an assessment order and a corresponding notice of demand dated January 30, 2026, amounting to Rs. 31,36,30,330/- for AY 2022-23. The recomputed total income for AY 2022-23 is now Rs. 52,54,110/. Brainbees Solutions Ltd will be filing an appeal before the Hon’ble Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT) in due course. The Company maintains high standards of integrity, corporate governance, and compliance in all aspects of its operations, including prompt payment of taxes.

  • Brainbees Solutions Ltd receives rectification order from Income Tax Department
  • Demand for AY 2022-23 reduced from Rs. 31,36,30,330/- to Rs. 38,37,210/-
  • Total income for AY 2022-23 recomputed to Rs. 52,54,110/-
  • Company to file an appeal before the Hon’ble Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT) in due course
  • Brainbees Solutions Ltd emphasizes commitment to high standards of integrity, corporate governance, and compliance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brainbees Solutions Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [TRABI] Transgene Biotek Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Transgene Biotek Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure is in accordance with the Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations. The window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons covered under the company’s Code of Conduct. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited financials results will be informed in due course.

  • Transgene Biotek Ltd closes trading window for dealing in securities
  • Closure in accordance with Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Applies to designated persons, their immediate relatives, and connected persons
  • Date of Board of Directors' meeting to approve Audited financials results to be informed later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSGENE BIOTEK LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMBUJACEM] Ambuja Cements Ltd Receives 'Care EDGE – ESG 1+' Rating from CARE ESG Ratings Limited
item.description:
Ambuja Cements Ltd has been assigned an ESG rating of ‘Care EDGE – ESG 1+’ by CARE ESG Ratings Limited. This rating signifies a leadership position in managing ESG risk through best-in-class disclosures, policies, and performance. This information is being shared in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and the SEBI Master Circular HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The rating will also be made available on the company's website.

  • Ambuja Cements Ltd receives 'Care EDGE – ESG 1+’ rating from CARE ESG Ratings Limited
  • This rating signifies a leadership position in managing ESG risk
  • The rating is based on best-in-class disclosures, policies, and performance
  • The intimation is in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular
  • The rating will be available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBUJA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [OLPCL] Olympic Cards Ltd Seeks Waiver of Fines Totaling Rs. 2,46,320 Due to COVID-19 Pandemic and Other Reasons
item.description:
Olympic Cards Ltd has requested the waiver of fines totaling Rs. 2,46,320, which were imposed due to non-compliance with various regulations. The company argues that the non-compliance was due to the COVID-19 pandemic, prolonged illness of the Company Secretary, and inadvertent omissions by sub-staff. The company has provided detailed reasons for the waiver and has filed waiver petitions.

  • Olympic Cards Ltd seeks waiver of fines totaling Rs. 2,46,320.
  • The fines were imposed due to non-compliance with various regulations.
  • The company argues that the non-compliance was due to the COVID-19 pandemic, prolonged illness of the Company Secretary, and inadvertent omissions by sub-staff.
  • The company has provided detailed reasons for the waiver and has filed waiver petitions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OLYMPIC CARDS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SASKEN] Sasken Technologies Ltd Receives Assessment Order from Income Tax Department
item.description:
Sasken Technologies Ltd has received an assessment order under section 143(3) read with section 144B from the Assessment Unit, Income Tax Department. The order, received on March 24, 2026, has added additional disallowance under section 14A of Income Tax Act and income disclosed under Schedule A-OI not offered for tax. This has resulted in a tax demand of Rs. 8,14,70,360. The company, however, states that there is no material impact on financial, no impact on operation or other activities due to the dismissal of appeal. The orders are currently appealable, and the company plans to exercise its right to appeal before CIT – Appeals.

  • Sasken Technologies Ltd received an assessment order from the Income Tax Department
  • The order adds additional disallowance under section 14A of Income Tax Act and income disclosed under Schedule A-OI not offered for tax
  • This results in a tax demand of Rs. 8,14,70,360
  • The company states no material impact on financial or operational activities
  • The orders are currently appealable and the company plans to appeal before CIT – Appeals

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sasken Technologies Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [MANAPPURAM] Manappuram Finance Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Manappuram Finance Ltd has announced that the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company will be closed from April 01, 2026, till the end of 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window to close from April 01, 2026, till the end of 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for FY 2025-2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results will be announced later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANAPPURAM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BENCHMARK] Trading Window Closure Notice for Benchmark Computer Solutions Ltd's Half-Yearly and Yearly Results
item.description:
Benchmark Computer Solutions Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the half yearly and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of audited financial results will be intimated later. The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.

  • Trading window closure for all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Board Meeting date for financial results declaration to be intimated later
  • In accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Part of Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Benchmark Computer Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JMFINANCIL] JM Financial Ltd. Subscribes to 24,25,000 Shares of Wholly Owned Subsidiary at a Premium of USD 0.48 Each
item.description:
JM Financial Ltd. has subscribed to 24,25,000 ordinary shares of USD 1 each of JM Financial Overseas Holdings Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. The subscription is at a premium of USD 0.48 per ordinary share, amounting to an aggregate consideration of USD 3.59 million (~Rs. 33.70 Crore). The acquisition is expected to support the expansion of the overseas businesses of JMFOHPL, including the incorporation of new subsidiaries. The acquisition is exempted from related party transactions and the Company will continue to hold 100% shareholding in JMFOHPL post the acquisition.

  • JM Financial Ltd. subscribes to 24,25,000 shares of its wholly owned subsidiary, JM Financial Overseas Holdings Private Limited.
  • The subscription is at a premium of USD 0.48 per ordinary share, amounting to an aggregate consideration of USD 3.59 million (~Rs. 33.70 Crore).
  • The acquisition is expected to support the expansion of the overseas businesses of JMFOHPL, including the incorporation of new subsidiaries.
  • The acquisition is exempted from related party transactions.
  • Post the acquisition, the Company will continue to hold 100% shareholding in JMFOHPL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JM FINANCIAL LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [MANAPPURAM] Manappuram Finance Ltd. to Consider Borrowing Program for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Manappuram Finance Ltd. has informed BSE that the Board of Directors will meet on 30/03/2026 to consider and approve the borrowing program for the Financial Year 2026-27. The program includes issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds and other debt securities in the onshore and/or offshore markets by way of private placement and/or public issue and other permissible modes of borrowing.

  • Manappuram Finance Ltd. to consider borrowing program for FY 2026-27
  • Includes issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds and other debt securities
  • Borrowing to be done through private placement and/or public issue and other permissible modes
  • Meeting scheduled on 30/03/2026
  • Announcement made under Regulations 29 and 50 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANAPPURAM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MELSTAR] Melstar Information Technologies Ltd: Non-Executive Chairman and Independent Director, Mr. Uttam Prakash Agarwal, Resigns Effective March 23, 2026
item.description:
Mr. Uttam Prakash Agarwal has resigned as the Non-Executive Chairman and Independent Director of Melstar Information Technologies Ltd, owing to his preoccupation with other professional commitments and responsibilities. The resignation will take effect from March 23, 2026. This decision was made in compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mr. Agarwal also serves as a Non-Executive Independent Director in Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited and 3I Infotech Limited.

  • Mr. Uttam Prakash Agarwal has resigned as Non-Executive Chairman and Independent Director of Melstar Information Technologies Ltd.
  • The resignation will take effect from March 23, 2026.
  • Mr. Agarwal serves as a Non-Executive Independent Director in Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited and 3I Infotech Limited.
  • The resignation is in compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • Mr. Agarwal is resigning due to his preoccupation with other professional commitments and responsibilities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MELSTAR INFORMATION TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
